review_text: Fogged only once all winter. Impact rating is the real reason I bought them.
Wore them under a respirator for a nine hour shift, stayed clear the whole time.
Lens held up to a stray grinder spark. Ugly as sin though.
Temples dig in after a few hours. Everything else is excellent.
Emailed about a scratched lens, got a reply in two days with a replacement.
Clear vision, solid build, looks like safety gear from 1998.
No fogging even coming in from the cold. Worth every cent.
Fogs the moment I put a mask on. Had to keep lifting them.
Lightest pair I have owned, I forget they are on. Shame about the fogging.
Z87 stamped and it took a knock without cracking.
Support never answered. Two emails, three weeks, nothing.
Comfortable enough to wear over glasses, which nothing else managed.
Steams up constantly indoors. Returned them, refund took a month.
Fit is great, optics are fine, anti-fog coating is marketing fiction.
Look sharp enough that I wear them off site. Fogging is average.
Best looking safety glasses on the market. Nose pads are torture.
Cracked lens replaced free within a week, no argument.
Mid range protection, fine for light work, would not use them grinding.
Seller walked me through the fit guide before I ordered.
Fog clears fast once you move. Frame pinches by lunchtime.
